message.content:
❯ can you revert the pull#3 or before we made changes to the UI design?                            
                                                                        
● Let me check the git log to find the relevant commits.                                           
                                                                                                 
● Bash(git log --oneline --all | head -30)                                                         
  ⎿  bef2b5f Clean up about.tsx: remove fake claims and fix broken link
     641dd46 Update home page copy: restore Replit headline, remove fake stats                     
     1b3bfa4 Switch brand pages from dark canvas to warm light theme                             
     … +20 lines (ctrl+o to expand)                                                                
                                                                                                   
● Bash(git log --oneline --all | tail -20)     
  ⎿  47cbe73 Saved progress at the end of the loop                                                 
     844ff3e Add functionality to log and view lead activities on the HQ page                      
     a5b31fd Add functionality to log and view lead activities on the HQ page
     … +13 lines (ctrl+o to expand)                                                                
                                                                                                   
● Bash(git show fa71c9c --stat | head -20)     
  ⎿  commit fa71c9cffed5d134854f8b83a34a687127157467                                               
     Merge: b6d5fd1 4023504                                                                        
     Author: ApolloDNR <apollosynd@gmail.com>  
     … +9 lines (ctrl+o to expand)                                                                 
                                                                                                   
● Bash(git show cc11b1c --stat | head -30)            
  ⎿  commit cc11b1cf3e02886bd5400ccd0a0b7c9312bbef6e                                               
     Merge: fa71c9c 60c5797                                                                        
     Author: ApolloDNR <apollosynd@gmail.com>         
     … +19 lines (ctrl+o to expand)                                                                
                                                                                                   
● Bash(git show 0bae76e --stat | head -20)            
  ⎿  commit 0bae76e887fed74071e39b43ff5863693093bbb7                                               
     Merge: 5d648c0 c6cf4d4                                                                        
     Author: ApolloDNR <apollosynd@gmail.com>         
     … +17 lines (ctrl+o to expand)                                                                
                                                                                                   
● Here's what I found. Let me clarify what's available:
                                                                                                   
  - PR #3 (fa71c9c) — only changed .env.example and README.md (deployment prep, no UI changes)     
  - PR #4 (cc11b1c) — this was the big UI redesign: "Premium public website redesign: Pegasus brand
   system and pillar pages" (16 files, new brand components, complete page overhaul)               
  - After PR #4 — several more commits tweaked the theme (warm/light colors, copy changes, etc.)   
  - PR #4 (cc11b1c) — this was the big UI redesign: "Premium public website redesign: Pegasus brand system and pillar pages" (16
  files, new brand components, complete page overhaul)
  - After PR #4 — several more commits tweaked the theme (warm/light colors, copy changes, etc.)

  So the UI design changes started with PR #4. If you want to revert to before the UI redesign, that means going back to the state
  right after PR #3 (fa71c9c).

  That would undo all of these commits:
  bef2b5f Clean up about.tsx
  641dd46 Update home page copy
  1b3bfa4 Switch brand pages from dark canvas to warm light theme
  03ce0a3 Launch-readiness polish pass
  ba87721 Restore Replit design while keeping safer Pegasus copy
  e2a9cd0/46e0bfa Update website theme to warm ivory
  d8c8462/cb56b15 Saved progress
  08b6c74 Pegasus Classic Premium visual retune
  39166af/23eabce Add debugging tools
  7b096fe/8bc5be8 Update changelog
  a53f3e3 Fix server crash and dark-theme flash
  cc11b1c Merge PR #4 (the big redesign)
  60c5797 Pre-merge polish pass for PR #4
  811e62a Rebuild public website: premium dark brand

  This is a hard reset — it will permanently discard all those changes on main. Do you want to:
  1. Hard reset main to fa71c9c (destructive, loses all above)
  2. Create a new branch at fa71c9c to preview the old state without losing current work

  Which would you prefer?

✻ Cooked for 45s

❯ 1                                                                                                                                 

● Running the hard reset to fa71c9c (state after PR #3, before any UI redesign).

● Bash(git reset --hard fa71c9c)
  ⎿  HEAD is now at fa71c9c Merge pull request #3 from ApolloDNR/codex/prepare-for-final-deployment-audit
  ⎿  Not logged in · Please run /login

✻ Worked for 6s

❯ Hello?                                                                                                                            
  ⎿  Not logged in · Please run /login

✻ Worked for 0s

❯ claude?                                                                                                                           
  ⎿  Not logged in · Please run /login
                                                                                                                                    
✻ Baked for 0s

attachment.content:
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch
